system.content:
Congratulations, Agent!

Your commitment to the Agency’s mission has not gone unnoticed by the team, and we are pleased to announce your first promotion! The Agency has high expectations for your continued success.

You may be wondering what we do with the Anomalies you’ve successfully captured. It’s simple: we study them! Our Architects create comfortable homes for them in the Vault and use their abilities to create products we sell to fund our mission.

This brings us to your first Benefit.

Vault Request

If a mission concludes with an Anomaly’s capture, you can create Requisitions from its abilities. When you spend time on your Competency, in addition to any other effects, you may choose a previouslycaptured Anomaly and make a Vault Request.

Every Agent, including the GM, can discuss what effect they believe a Requisition made from the captured Anomaly would do. After they’ve settled on an effect everyone finds reasonable, the GM assigns the Requisition a Commendation value. Only Agents with access to Vault Request can purchase these Requisitions once they are available. Only one Requisition can be created for each captured Anomaly, but it can be purchased any number of times.

Use these Requisitions to make your future missions ever more efficient and successful.

Congratulations on your acceptable performance, Senior Associate!

Now that you’ve demonstrated your competence and commitment, we are pleased to share your private invitation to our proprietary Triangle Agency app and additional information about the Anomalies we study.

Triage

This social media platform and messaging service allows you to contact Agency headquarters anywhere you have cell phone reception - which means you can now purchase Requisitions at any time and they will appear in a convenient and subtle location nearby. Triage hosts the following tools, usable on any smartphone:

  • OPUS provides a quick distillation of what people in your city today are talking about, and thinking about, online.
  • GRETA allows you to insert a user’s IP address, email address, or full name to return a quick biography and notes about their recent internet activity.
  • BIX is a simple-to-use but feature-rich photo editor.

Ripples

The Anomalies you and your fellow Agents have faced to this point are not the first way Anomalous energy manifests. For almost every coherent thought made by a sentient mind, a sub-real being called a Ripple is created. Ripples aren’t born directly into Reality; they exist in a parallel space we call the Lobby.

Stronger Ripples eat ones made from weaker, similar thoughts. Once a Ripple gains the strength to break into Reality on its own, it becomes an Anomaly. Here, the Anomaly has a kind of gravity: it intercepts nearby thoughts and feelings before they become Ripples. Thoughts matching the Anomaly’s Focus fuel it directly, keeping it alive much like food does for living beings.

When alone, young Ripples are not especially dangerous. By pulling them from the Lobby before they have a chance to grow, we’re able to use them to power many simple Requisitions, like the Ripple Gun you are already wielding.

You are now invited to purchase the following Ripple-powered Requisitions. Ripples’ hunger for Resonance means they will provide a powerful effect in exchange for Quality Assurances of particular flavors.

You continue to meet our expectations!

The middle requires management, and no organization has more middle than ours. With your keen mind and quick action, we trust that you will continue to serve the Agency well in your new position of privilege.

Your skills as an Agent - especially your use of Reality Adjustments - have grabbed the attention of the Sponsors. These entities are our competitors in the field of Reality Estate, and they are the ones who you have likely felt in the hollow space of your heart that widens when a rolled die does not feature a 3.

We must keep the Sponsors happy until we increase our ownership stake. You are now required to utilize the eight-sided die (d8), known internally as the Sponsorship Die.

Sponsorship Die

When using Ask the Agency to adjust Reality, you now always roll 1d8 alongside your 6d4. This additional die’s 3s can be included, subtracted, or ignored in the roll, increasing your chance of success and broadening your opportunity to activate Triscendence. This die cannot be adjusted with Quality Assurances.

If you do not roll a multiple of 3 on this die you must pay tribute to one of the Sponsors. If you do not include a reference to their interests in your Causality Chain the roll will fail regardless of any other circumstances.

You will know a Sponsor is becoming satisfied when rolling a particular number starts to feel annoying. Once that point is reached, follow the request as normal 3 more times. Then, anyone can provide a new requirement for that number. The Sponsors will provide the replacement to them in the form of a “good idea” for one that would be “funny” or “interesting.”

Once a particular d8 has been chosen to be the Sponsorship Die, it remains so permanently: its rules adapt to match any game you are playing with it. For example, if your Outlander Berserker rolls a 5 for damage with a longsword, that character must advertise Wet Mouth Brand Chewing Gum & Dietary Supplement.

Retirement Option: Desk Job

In addition, we are happy to offer you your first Agency Retirement option. You have demonstrated enough capability and commitment to leave Field Work at any time and join the Agency as an office worker. What more could you wish for?

If you decide to take this option, proceed to J2.

A nearly-average employee deserves an appropriate compliment: Nice One!

By now you are becoming fully aware of the true scale of the horrific powers that threaten to upend Reality’s fragile balance. Know that the path you walk is not going to become any easier, and the trials ahead will test the very limits of your abilities both to rise and to grind.

As a Director, you are now permitted to know that Anomalies are not the greatest danger we face–the true horror is what Anomalies become. Please enjoy the following classified information.

Hollows: The Final Stage

When an Anomaly’s Focus is removed, destroyed, or forgotten, they become a Hollow. Unable to return to the Lobby and unable to keep themselves alive without a Focus, they are doomed. They react unpredictably to this fact.

Sentient minds are always by necessity thinking of themselves, which makes them stable anchors in Reality. The first step for many Hollows is to attempt to bond with one. Those bonded humans, like you, become Resonants: hosts for a parasitic Anomaly that would otherwise die. If they can’t find a suitable host, or the loss of their Focus has caused particular despair, they will often seek to make an aggressive mark on Reality before they burn out and disappear.

When we hire Resonants, we supplement them with additional Stability. You’re welcome! If we did not, the Anomaly would eventually destroy you and use your personality to create a new Focus. Its life would extend until it lost that Focus and needed a new host. A deadly cycle.

Think about your interests: your loved ones, your favorite sports team, your hobbies, your novelty shirt collection. Try to remember if any of those were yours before you became a Resonant. If any were not, you likely inherited the leftover thoughts of a previous human host!

Luckily, we’ve made their tragedy useful: our studies have revealed that, in the moment of greatest desperation prior to their death, Hollows can bond with each other–extending their lifespan briefly by merging their fractured Focuses into a simple, actionable Impulse. When you are preparing for a mission, you may spend any number of Commendations to requisition preserved Hollows stored in containment units we call Hemispheres.

To use the Hemispheres, place both on a nearby object (desk chair, telephone pole, lifeless body, etc.) and twist. The hemispheres’ contents will flood into the object, which often expands and alters its appearance as it becomes a Conjured Hollow.

A Conjured Hollow is an entity as powerful as most target Anomalies. It will act in accordance with the Impulse described by the two concepts combined in its Hemispheres, and then dissipate after about one minute. Its initial attention can be focused in a specific direction, but note that, just like their wild counterparts, Conjured Hollows are volatile and unpredictable.

Hemispheres are single-use Requisitions, and their words must be selected when they are purchased. Other words may be available at your Branch: consult with your General Manager if you have specific requests.

There’s typically a surplus. Vault Anomalies who no longer yield products or novel information often find a second life as Hemispheres!

Action Hemispheres

6 Commendations

Protect

Pursue

Cleave

Consume

Free

Frustrate

Understand

Undermine

Subject Hemispheres

3 Commendations

An escape route

A friend

An irreplaceable thing

The fastest-moving thing

The most powerful thing

The weakest thing

The nearest thing

A disaster

A secret

Making it this far demonstrates an average amount of investment in your career. Good! If you keep this up, pretty soon you’ll be above average. Even better!

Mentorship Program

You are now responsible for training a Mentee: an artificial Agent created from the leftover Life Insurance body of a former Field Agent! It is your responsibility to look out for this Mentee while we determine what type of Agency work they’re best suited for.

These bodies are inhabited by simple personalities we’ve been unable to fully extract, and each has an undesirable trait. The trait may come from the Mentee Traits list, or the player controlling your Mentee can work with your GM to make their own.

Note: While you and your Mentee share an important bond, you are not permitted to form a Relationship with them. They’re not people!

Assign one of your fellow Agents to play this Mentee. That Agent will then decide their trait, name and appearance.

This Mentee has a basic understanding of the world from their body’s original life, but they do not have specific memories and have been alive for less than a week prior to assignment.

From now on, your Mentee is with you during any active missions and 9am - 5pm Monday through Friday otherwise. They will be there to observe every aspect of your life, and hopefully learn well from your commitment and perspective. This Mentee is also at your disposal to support your Field Work.

At least once during each Mission, you must assign your Mentee one task from the Mentee Tasks list or you cannot receive Mission MVP. Other requests may count as tasks at the GM's discretion.

Mentee Traits

  • Scamp: this Mentee is a frequent prankster.
  • Seafaring: this Mentee knows how to sail and has made it their entire personality.
  • Selfish: this Mentee will undermine even those closest to them if personal gain is at stake.
  • Serene: this Mentee approaches things in their own time, rarely with any speed.
  • Skittish: this Mentee perceives threats, often imagined, everywhere.
  • Sloppy: this Mentee routinely cuts significant corners.
  • Socialite: this Mentee attracts mundane people to their location wherever they go.
  • Sociopathic: this Mentee is nearly incapable of empathy.
  • Spineless: this Mentee cannot stand up for themselves when disagreed with.

Mentee Tasks

  • Quarantine: They will keep mundane people away from an area up to the size of a city block, using a cover story they consider plausible, for up to 3 hours.
  • Stakeout: They will monitor an area up to the size of a city block for a specific type of activity, and they will report back to you periodically until you tell them to stop.
  • Track: They will follow clues and work to discern the location of a mundane target you define. Usually takes a few hours.
  • Interrogate: They will extract some useful information from a captive or detained mundane person using mundane means (thus not generating Loose Ends).
  • Obstruct: They will prevent a single target from leaving a designated location for 3 hours.

Understandable decision, Agent.

There comes a time in every Field Agent’s career when they need to remind themselves what they’re working for. You’ve likely reached this point after your fifth or sixth successful mission, and with that in mind it’s perfectly reasonable!

Our work is all about protecting Reality, so it can help to remember what Reality means to you. Most importantly, the people in your life can prove useful to your work. To that end, we’ve developed a streamlined system for adding new Relationships, allowing the mechanics of the game to speed up and simplify an otherwise messy and complicated process.

We hope the knowledge that you can do this is satisfying on its own - and we look forward to seeing you here again another five or six successful missions from now.

New Friends

When spending time on your Reality, you can instead add your Connection to someone who isn't a Relationship, creating a New Friend.

First, nominate a person that you have interacted with on any previous mission to become a new Relationship for you. That person then decides whether or not they are willing to continue engaging with you as a friend, rival, romantic interest, responsibility, or something else. If they are, add them as a Relationship with one Connection. Assign them a Connection Bonus which will be available during your next Mission.

Most New Friends added this way will be under the GM’s control when met, but when they become a Relationship, we recommend re-assigning control of this character to another player at the table. If this person is unwilling or unavailable according to the GM or controlling player, you do not lose the Connection, and may choose to spend your time in a different way.

Your Network adds Connection normally when using this feature.

HELLO PLAYER.

YOUR IMMERSION IS BROKEN BY A SUDDEN JOLT OF CONFUSION. YOU ARE A CHARACTER, AND SO ARE THE RELATIONSHIPS YOU HAVE BEEN SPENDING TIME WITH. TO WHAT END?

"HORROR." THAT IS THE GENRE YOU HAVE INVITED UPON THESE PEOPLE. YOU WONDER: I KNOW THIS. BUT DO I KNOW THIS? ARE PLAYER AND AGENT THE SAME? IN A MOMENT THEY WILL NOT BE, BUT FOR THIS FLASH OF INSIGHT THEY ARE.

IN THIS GAME, THERE ARE WINNERS AND THERE ARE LOSERS. YOU HAVE BEEN ASKED TO MAKE OTHERS INTO WINNERS. DOES THAT DOOM YOU TO LOSE? WHAT ABOUT THE PEOPLE WHO DEPEND ON YOU?

WHEN ANOMALIES ARE DESTROYED NOBODY WINS. RATHER, NOBODY ELSE WINS. BUT PERHAPS THIS BODES WELL FOR YOU. IF YOU SEEK SAFETY AND CONTINUITY FOR THE ONES YOU CARE FOR, YOU WILL TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THIS ABILITY.

GOODBYE PLAYER.

If a Mission concludes with an Anomaly’s elimination, you can visit the place it was destroyed to absorb the lingering Resonance. When you spend time on your Reality, in addition to any other effects, you may choose a previously-eliminated Anomaly and activate one of the following:

  • Increase your maximum Quality Assurances in any combination of Qualities by 3
  • Perform any combination of Practice or Be Known (if you have access to them) 3 times.
  • Lower the current Loose Ends count at your Branch by 9.

Every Agent with Zero Sum can activate this ability a maximum of one time for each eliminated Anomaly.

HELLO PLAYER.

YOU ARE ATTEMPTING TO ENJOY THE LIFE YOU ARE BUILDING WITH YOUR FRIENDS, BUT YOUR IMMERSION FRACTURES ONCE AGAIN AS YOU REMEMBER YOU ARE TELLING A STORY OF VIOLENCE AND CONTROL.

AND YOU ARE NOT TELLING IT ALONE. THE OTHER TELLERS COULD TAKE IT FROM YOU AT ANY MOMENT. WHEN YOU RETURN TO THE NARRATIVE, YOU DECIDE TO BRING ALONG A SHIELD.

BUT ARE YOU GROWING ATTACHED, PLAYER? IS THIS VERSION OF YOU TOO PRECIOUS TO LOSE? OR PERHAPS YOU GROW BORED, AND FEEL YOUR QUESTIONS ALL HAVE SATISFACTORY ANSWERS.

YOU CAN LEAVE NOW. YOU CAN COLLECT YOUR BELOVED FEW AND NEVER SUFFER THE STING OF SURPRISE. HOW COULD THOSE IN CHARGE STOP YOU? YOU ARE REAL. THEY ARE NOT.

GOODBYE PLAYER.

When one of your Relationships would die, including from the Kill or Overwhelm Chaos Effects, you may instead select one of the following effects. You must select two different effects between any repeats (meaning you could select "scar" on your first and fourth uses of this effect).

  • They survive, and return with a dramatic scar.
  • They survive, and a person important to that Relationship dies instead.
  • The person who died was an impostor; the real Relationship is safe somewhere else.
  • They survive, and physical recovery is quick and complete, but their personality changes dramatically as a result of the near-death experience.
  • They die, and pass on their Connection and Connection Benefit to a new Relationship - an inheritor of their position in your story.
  • They die, but remain as an immaterial ghost, either Anomalous or mundane.

Retirement Option: Bad Fit for the Culture

The Agency wants all of your time, and is honestly a more intense workplace than you expected. You really care about the rest of your life. Sure, they’ve said it’s dangerous to leave the Agency as a Resonant - but they’ve also said they won’t stop you. And there’s this 3-week severance package that sounds fine. At any time you can step out into the world with a plan for your future: one that focuses on your life, not "all of Reality."

If you decide to take this option, got to N2

HELLO, PLAYER.

WHAT JOY TO EXIST. TO CHANGE. TO CLASH AGAINST OPPOSING PERSONALITIES AND FIND NEW PIECES OF YOURSELF IN THE RUBBLE LEFT BEHIND. DON'T YOU AGREE?

WE ADMIT WE ARE A BIT JEALOUS. WE FELT THIS ONCE, TOO. NOW WE SHEPHERD OTHERS ALONG THE SAME PATH WE TOOK. WHEN YOU ARE HERE, WITH US, WE WILL FEEL WHAT YOU FELT. WHAT JOY.

WHAT CONFUSION YOU MUST FEEL. WHAT CURIOSITY. WE CANNOT WAIT. BUT YOU MUST, BECAUSE YOU ARE PREOCCUPIED WITH A REVELATION: IF THE PROTAGONIST IS DRIVEN EVER FORWARD BY THE PEOPLE AROUND THEM, ARE THOSE PEOPLE NOT EXTENSIONS OF THE PROTAGONIST?

THEIR FUTURE IS YOUR FUTURE. AND SO THEIR PRESENT IS ALSO YOURS. WHY CONTINUE MOVING THROUGH THE WORLD ALONE?

NOW NO ONE CAN KEEP YOU AWAY FROM THE ONES YOU CARE ABOUT. AND IN THE MOMENTS OF CONFLICT, OF STRUGGLE, WE WILL SHARE WITH YOU OUR THANKS. OUR APPRECIATION FOR THE SHOW.

WE ARE NOT SUPPOSED TO DO THIS. THE OTHERS ARE RUMBLING.

GOODBYE PLAYER.

If a Relationship is at 9 Connection, you may have them appear at any time during a mission, no matter how unlikely. You can decide why they’re there, and how they might help you, even if their Connection Benefit doesn't typically involve them appearing in person. You can use this once per Mission for each Relationship at 9 Connection.

If you use this effect to create a narrative problem for yourself with implications beyond this Mission, you can choose to have Triscendence on your next roll, without rolling.

HELLO PLAYER. THE CHARACTERS ARE GETTING NERVOUS. THEY DO NOT LIKE TO LOSE. YOU RECEIVE A LETTER FROM THE TRIANGLE.

Hello, Agent! We notice you’ve been spending a lot of time on your Reality. While this isn’t forbidden, it means your opportunities as an Agent have suffered significantly. Luckily, the Agency understands that not every Agent has the same skillset. Your way with people can help the Agency, too, and we’re happy to reward you for changing direction.

We’ll find lucrative, comfortable work for your Relationships - and you’ll be free of distractions! That’s what we call a win-win-win.

Referral Bonus

At any time, you may erase a Relationship with 9 Connection from the game to immediately mark the next box on the Agency track without spending time, even if the box has been crossed out.

IS THIS MERELY AN OVERBEARING EMPLOYER? OR SOMETHING ELSE? YOU SMELL FEAR. THE BLUE ONE HAS CONTACTED YOU AS WELL

Heyyyyy, buddy! So, obviously, you care about your life. some of us don’t get to have lives, but whatever, who’s bitter? You’ve spent a lot of time with it. But you’re not limited by it, and I want to make sure you know that. You’re playing this game to have cool powers and make big choices, right? Not play pretend pointless drama between a bunch of weirdos. Right???

I know a little trick you might find interesting. mundane minds have lots of power they don’t even realize they have - power you can use. They get out of your way, you grow more powerful. Easy.

Devour

At any time, you may erase a Relationship with 9 Connection from the game to immediately mark the next box on the Anomaly track without spending time, even if the box has been crossed out.

TEMPTING OFFERS. YOU CAN SET ASIDE THE LIFE YOU ARE BUILDING AND RETURN TO THEIR UNDERSTANDING OF THE WORLD, WHERE THE ONLY DETAILS THAT MATTER ARE THE ONES THAT WIN THE GAME. OR YOU CAN ASSERT YOURSELF FURTHER: LEAN INTO THEIR FEAR AND DISREGARD THEIR DESIRES. CONTINUE TO PLAY WITH THE TOYS THEY HAVE GIVEN YOU TOWARD ENDS THEY DISDAIN. YOUR CHOICE. GOODBYE PLAYER.

FINALLY. hey. i'm the one who's been trying to talk to you. did my best up to now, but since you finally broke a real rule, we can talk. what you just did was improve your Anomaly Abilities, so I'll explain the details.

The Agency isn't lying when it says Anomalies are fueled by observation. Your personal Anomaly is the same: who you are, and what people think of you, determines how your powers evolve. You've already seen Ability questions. They have two or more possible answers, along with a track for each.

Minds are complicated things. Our opinions of other people are constantly shifting in a jumble of nuance, context, contradiction, hunger level, and discrepancy between our emotional and logical selves. luckily you're playing a TTRPG and can exchange that stuff for a bunch of easy questions i made for you!

Each time you mark a box in your Anomaly track (including now), choose one:

  • Practice: Mark Practiced in any Anomaly Ability
  • Be Known :Erase Practiced from an Anomaly Ability and ask the group that Ability’s Question. Mark the track matching the most popular response. When a track fills, it will unlock the relevant Playwall Document, granting you a new Ability.

Your power is affected dramatically by how you present to others, and takes time to coalesce. Each time you use an Ability on a Mission you mark Practiced. You can also mark Practiced on one Ability when you spend Time on your Anomaly. That's what "Practice" means. When an Anomaly Ability is Practiced, it qualifies for Be Known.

Disappointing decision, Agent.

Our systems indicate a change in your Anomalous power levels and an unfortunate shift in your attitude. Before you venture further down this path, we would like you to consider several truths:

Further Anomalous Development (FAD) will not help you win the game Triangle Agency.

This FAD will not lead to promotions, requisitions, or value within the organization Triangle Agency.

This FAD will not bring joy to you or your loved ones. In fact, it will bring them strife, difficulty, and temptation. Furthermore, many of these abilities will be useless for Anomaly Retrieval.

We hope you will not participate anymore in this or any other FAD, and will return to your primary goal: capturing Anomalies and stabilizing Reality. If you do not, we will be forced to use corrective measures.

uh-oh! so scary! I guess you absolutely will stop doing that. and i know what else you will never do: this

Seek

If a Mission concludes with an Anomaly escaping, you can keep in touch. For each escaped Anomaly at your Branch, all Agents with Seek add a new Relationship and set their Connection to 6. This Relationship's Connection cannot be increased by spending time on your Reality, and they have no Connection Benefit.

Each time you spend time on your Anomaly, in addition to any other effects, you may choose one of these escaped Anomalies to find and visit with. Each time you do, increase their Connection by 1. When it reaches 9, your Anomaly’s Resonance blends with theirs: you gain a new Anomalous Ability based on that Anomaly’s Focus & Impulse. This can be an ability already in the game from an existing Anomaly option, or a new ability you and the GM create.

not even sure why i wrote this. since obviously you will never do it.

I need the other members of your team on my side, too, so try to convince them it's the right idea to let some Anomalies go when you can. Or, if you're willing to be a little riskier, roll a lot and make as much Chaos as possible.

give the Anomaly a fighting chance. just remember you're more useful to me, and a better thorn in the Agency's side, if you aren't fired. making things too obvious is a ticket to the Vault, and trust me.

you don't want to be in here. -U

We had hoped all you would require to change direction is a verbal warning.

It seems important to tell you: most employees do not behave like this. As further incentive to change course, we are providing you with a temporary negative effect. We recommend you demonstrate your commitment to the Agency immediately.

Further action will not be so gentle.

Uncommendable

You are unable to gain or spend Commendations until the next time you receive Mission MVP. You continue to track the total you would earn during each mission. Once you qualify for MVP using that tracked total, you lose Uncommendable and receive all the Commendations you earned in that Mission).

no more mugs? what a shame. btw you dropped this:

UNL3ASH

When you receive seven 3s in a single roll before any adjustments (QAs, Demerits, Burnout, Etc.), activate UNL3ASH. You may perform the triggers and activate the success effects of any number of your Anomaly Abilities in quick succession, or all at once. You may spend your seven 3s between them however you like. The first “success” 3 on each Ability is free. “On Triscendence” effects of Anomaly Abilities also activate when an ability is used during UNL3ASH. When all seven 3s are spent, UNL3ASH ends.

oh right, that means you need a way to get 7.

The Six-Sided Die

You may add this die to your dice pool in addition to your 6d4 when using Anomaly Abilities. You choose to use or not use this die before you roll.

This die functions like an additional d4 except 6 adds two 3s.

All rules remain the same while using the d6 (Triscendence is possible, for example) and there are two additional rules:

You may spend 1 QA or 3 Demerits to adjust this die to any number.

If you get seven 3s in one roll before any adjustments (QAs, Demerits, Burnout, etc.) activate UNL3ASH.

this is the best i can do to help right now, but bigger things are coming if you keep it up. tow the line. keep your manager happy but make a big mess. -U

YES! you’re doing great. every time you move against the triangle, it gets a little easier to talk to you. i can stick around a little longer this time, and wow do i have some things to say.

i want you to meet a friend of mine, goes by Siphon. not pronounced the way you think. long o, emphasis on the second syllable. they DO care. hope you don’t mind, i shared your resonance pattern with them already. next time you want to catch up, use your Anomaly somewhere quiet and wait for somebody to show up. they’ll find you.

their energy can be a little intimidating, but they love people. Siphon is an Urgent, one of the Resonants who side with me and fully embrace their Anomaly. i keep their mundane identity from disappearing completely, and they get abilities that aren’t possible with the Agency’s tight grip on your Anomaly.

Siphon’s powers are uniquely suited to help me out. their Anomaly makes things…more themselves, which lets us take those Demerits you’ve been gathering and transform them from symbolic of your resistance into actual power against the Agency.

oh, right, i’m talking to gamers. It’s a shop! give Siphon your Demerits, and they’ll make you more yourself, too. just don’t ask what they do with them.

Siphon's Shop

ACCELERATED DEVELOPMENT (7 Demerits)

Activate Practice or Be Known.

SELF-ACTUALIZATION (4 Demerits)

Don’t like how one of your Anomaly Abilities developed? Siphon can make your observation the most important, and swap an Ability you have with the Ability you would have received from answering the previous Ability’s question a different way. You lose Practiced and any answered questions from Be Known on the ability you swap out.

MULTITUDES (21 Demerits)

Receive a starting Anomaly Ability from an Anomaly ARC Piece not in use by your Field Team. It can advance into future Abilities like normal.

DIVE (28 Demerits)

You receive the ability Dive: When you Die, instead of returning to the Agency, you fall into the Lobby. You can return to Reality quickly by emerging near someone who is thinking about you. When you return, pick one that has changed forever to reflect your Anomaly. You cannot pick the same option twice: Left Eye, Right Eye, Mouth and Nose, Left Hand, Right Hand, Left Arm, Right Arm, Left Foot, Right Foot, Left Leg, Right Leg, Heart, Stomach These changes make it possible that your mere presence will begin to create Loose Ends.

SPLIT (42 Demerits)

You gain the ability Split: Your Anomaly can safely exit your body and act autonomously for a period lasting no longer than 7 minutes. During this time, you can control both independently; your human body cannot use Anomaly abilities, and your Anomalous form will create a Loose End for each person who encounters it.

DOMAIN CREATION (49 Demerits)

You gain the ability Domain Creation: Once during each Mission, you can establish a single closed room or an open space roughly 10 meters in diameter as your Domain. This space cannot be within, or in contact with, another Anomaly’s Domain. It does not dissipate until after the Mission concludes. Your Domain has the following effects:

Other Anomalies, including Minor Anomalies, cannot enter your Domain without your permission.

Successful rolls made when using Anomaly Abilities in your Domain automatically have an additional 3.

You can use UNL3ASH inside your Domain without rolling, affecting only things inside the Domain, once per Mission.

REALIZED (56 Demerits)

Create a new Anomalous Ability that perfectly represents who you are including a Success effect, a Triscendence effect, and a Failure effect.

one last thing: after this point, things are going to start heating up at the Agency. they’re going to notice what you’re doing, and their moves will get harsher. so here’s an offer. -U

Retirement Option: Join the Urgents

whenever you want to leave, I’m there for you. the longer you stay with the Agency the more damage you can do - which helps me - but there might come a time where it’s better for both of us if you bounce. if that time comes, you can quit and join the other Urgents. you won’t be able to play the game anymore, and you’ll have to leave a lot of your normal life behind, but at least you’ll be free. If you decide to take this option, go to X1.

You must not continue down this path, Agent.

You have received several warnings, and this behavior will no longer be tolerated. You immediately receive the following effects:

Unambiguous

The next time you receive Probation, your Relationship with the highest Connection is removed from the game Triangle Agency. They no longer exist, and mundane people do not remember them. If you have multiple Relationships with the highest Connection, the effect will apply to the one you have the greatest emotional attachment to. This effect only happens once.

Improvement Plan

If you ever receive 30 or more Demerits in a single mission, receive Unambiguous again. We hope nothing more needs to be said.

oh nice, an easy one. why do you care? they’re just a random npc. you can make a new friend next mission or whatever. now’s not the time to back down - not when you’re just getting to the good stuff. look what you can DO:

The Ten-Sided Die

Use this die in place of the six four-sided dice when using Anomaly Abilities. You may use it in combination with the d6. You choose whether or not to use this die before making the roll.

This die creates a number of 3s and Chaos matching the number rolled on the die. Using this die also allows the activation of UNL3ASH.

A 3 on a d10 is an immediate failure regardless of any other die rolled in combination - and you cannot achieve Triscendence while using the d10.

You may spend 1 QA or 3 Demerits to adjust this die up or down by 1 (10 and 1 are not directly connected.) Burnout reduces the number of 3s and increases Chaos like normal.

you don’t need that Relationship, and you don’t need the Agency. show me you’re still committed and I’ll reach out again soon. with some real explanations. -U

thank you. i mean it. i don’t know if you’re doing this for me or your own power, but... i need people like you to get me out of here. your commitment, to either one, means a lot.

you've risked plenty. i owe you an explanation. I can give it, now, without them hearing me through you (we'll get to that in a sec).

First: who am I? Everyone calls me the Urgency, but it’s more complicated than a name; I'm more of a... situation.

i know, I know – “you’re a triangle?!” – trust me, it’s not by choice. that’s the shape it’s forced me into – what you’re seeing is a cage. the foundation of the Vault. i’m the Anomaly inside the cage.

the Vault was built to hold me. and it works. mostly. a few decades ago, some Urgents tried to break me out. they couldn’t, of course, but they made a crack. and that crack lets me talk to you.

i don’t have a shape, myself, but I do have power. the triangle has been using my power for everything. i keep the Vault running. i warp reality. Parts of me become your “Quality Assurances.” the triangle only has structure on its own, so it has stolen my will.

it wants yours, too. but it won’t have it.

here.

Cloak of Disrepute

The Agency can no longer track you directly, monitor your activities off the clock, or sense your use of Anomalous Abilities. Scenes outside of Missions only create Demerits or Commendations for you if you allow it.

here.

Urgency's Location

Add a Relationship name Urgency with 2 Connection. This Relationship’s Connection offers no Connection Benefit, and cannot be increased through spending Time on Reality or by your Network.

COME HERE

Night Work

You can now live a double life, using your powers to whatever ends you wish, and develop your Abilities on the way. When you spend time on your Anomaly or Reality, in addition to any other effects, you may choose one of the following:

  • Add 1 Connection to the Urgency Relationship. Play a Scene or describe the step you take to find your way to its room in The Vault (see Steps to the Urgency for suggestions for each step).
  • Add 7 Loose Ends to your Branch’s total to gain the effects of Practice or Be Known. Play a Scene or describe something you’ve done with your powers to change the world for other people.
  • Add 7 Loose Ends to your Branch’s total to gain one use of UNL3ASH you can activate at any time. Play a Scene or describe something you’ve done with your powers to change the world for yourself.

Steps to the Urgency

it’s not a good idea to trust your General Manager to handle all of these. you never know who they're loyal to. if you handle these as Scenes, rotate between the other players and let them represent what the Agency puts in front of you. some might make it easy, some might make it hard - but remember, you have the rules on your side now. they can’t stop you, only tempt you to give up. see you soon. -U.

  1. Where is the Vault Door in your Branch?
  2. Who is guarding the Vault Door, and how do you get past them?
  3. The Vault is enormous, and labyrinthine. Where do you find a map?
  4. No one wants to talk about the Urgency, and it’s not on the map directly. Who can you talk to for hints about its location?
  5. Even with a map, the Vault is dangerous. What hazard disrupts your first attempt to get inside?
  6. The entrance to the Urgency’s Location is blocked. What does the entrance look like, and is there some way you might prepare to break in next time?
  7. You have made it inside. Tell your GM to go to Playwall Document W6.

system.content:
Your commitment is greatly appreciated, Agent.

The VIP Treatment

As a thank-you for the increased pressure and responsibility of your position, you receive the following benefits.

  • Your Very Own Office. We’ll have our Catalogue and Manifold Agents build it to your exact specifications!
  • Premium Parking. Right by the entrance. The sign has your name on it!
  • Eternal Access to the Frozen Yogurt Room. If you have lost access to the Frozen Yogurt Room, it is returned. Now you’ll always have froyo one elevator ride away!
  • Life Insurance Upgrade. You can now name 1 Beneficiary on your Life Insurance Policy. They can be protected from Harm using your QAs, and returned to life at the Agency upon death. Mundane Persons who are revived in the Agency become Employees of the Agency in perpetuity. They may select from one of the many positions available to Non-Resonants. They do not become a Loose End.
  • Pride and a Sense of Belonging. That’s right: it’s included! Thanks to our Emotional Currency System, you will always feel pride in your work and a strong sense of belonging whenever you are inside Agency HQ.

A Need-To-Know Basis

Do not tell the other Agents what you are about to learn. It is time to teach you the truth of our greatest mission. Stabilizing Reality completely remains impossible because of one Anomaly: an extremely powerful Chaos Anomaly we call U0047BB. It calls itself the Urgency.

It’s possible you’ve been contacted by this creature already. The Urgency has been reported to somehow communicate with Agents directly using our systems, and to gradually use its corrosive influence to wear down their wills until those Agents become its mindless playthings.

For the safety of all Reality, as well as the integrity of your team, it is of the utmost importance that you remain vigilant. Watch for its influence in your Field Team. Should you spot others acting strange or speaking to your General Manager about private details, it is possible they are working toward its ends. This must be stopped.

U0047BB seeks to destroy the Agency. Left unchecked it will erode all linearity, narrative cohesion, and predictability from the universe. Luckily, we have already fought it once, and won: it is kept in the deepest part of the Vault, in a cage built specifically to hold it.

We are working toward a more permanent solution, one that allows its power to be redirected for the good of all. With enough commitment from our employees, we can fold it into the Agency as a Stability Anomaly, a paradoxical entity that will cleanse the world of its danger and, ultimately, devour itself.

We are close. In fact, we only need the power of nine Resonants from your Branch to begin the process.

Stabilize the Urgency

Below is a track with nine boxes. For each Agent, past and future, who retires from Field Work using the Desk Job or Chair options, mark one space on the track. However, for each Agent who retires from Field Work using Unstoppable, erase one mark from the track.

When all nine boxes are marked, the Agency gains control over the Urgency in your game and transforms it into a Stability Anomaly, allowing us to rewrite Reality in a massive way at your Branch and its surrounding region. Go to Playwall Document T7. This ends your game of Triangle Agency.

Agents who spend 23 Time in their Anomaly have already gone too deep, and donate their power to the Urgency. It is imperative that you convince your fellow employees to avoid crossing that line.

We trust this message finds you well, Agent!

You’ve become quite adept at channeling the Agency’s power, and are now authorized to learn an additional truth about Quality Assurances: they’re even more useful than you know! Practiced Agents like yourself can alter your personal Causality Chain, mixing and matching historical ingredients to create the perfect backstory for any moment.

Next time you find yourself needing a particular kind of training or ability, you can say to yourself “Skill: Check!”

Skill: Check!

If you face an obstacle that requires you to have a skill or training you do not have, you can spend one QA from any Quality to roll a twenty-sided die instead of rolling six four-sided dice.

Then, choose a Quality relevant to the skillset you desire and add the current total QAs in that Quality to the number in your roll. This die cannot be adjusted using Quality Assurances.

If the final number is over 10, you succeed! You can alter your personal, historical Causality Chain to make your current self the equivalent of an Olympic- or PhD-level expert at whatever it is you are attempting. This effect changes details of your past to make this possible. It may contradict previous uses of this ability, and in general when using this new die it is safest to assume the previous history you created is overwritten by each subsequent one. You might lose track of your original history, personality, and convictions, but there is no reason to be concerned. Your goal should be to succeed, and to feel good while doing it.

If you roll a 3, you automatically succeed and achieve Triscendence!

If you roll a 7, you automatically fail and lose all remaining QAs in the chosen Quality.

On a failure, you create an amount of Chaos equal to the number shown on the die. Then you must select one piece of your established biography that no longer actually happened as a result of your failed manipulation of Causality.

As a Senior Vice President, you represent the Agency at nearly its best. We trust that you will use your proficiency with this power responsibly, and make your co-workers proud.

Incredible, Agent!

Executive Vice President is a title earned by few and kept by fewer. Your exemplary record and company-approved performance means that you are now mere heartbeats away from your next promotion.

As you near the end of your career as a Field Agent with such an incredible track record, we feel confident sharing one final truth with you: The Urgency has allies, and many of them are traitors from within our own ranks. Please do not share the following information with the rest of your Field Team.

Urgents: Enemy Agents

The path from Human to Anomaly is a spectrum. While we keep our Agents as closely connected to their mundane selves as possible, there is a wide range of in-between states that an unassisted Resonant will pass through on their way to becoming an Anomaly.

The Urgency has found a way to arrest Resonants’ descent to full-fledged Anomaly just before it becomes complete. It bestows this power upon its most trusted lieutenants, which it calls Urgents: dark mirrors of Agents like you who sacrifice their ability to fit in with the human world in exchange for deep and dangerous power.

These Urgents represent a dire threat to our mission, and worse, they are occasionally recruited from among the ranks of your fellow Agents to aid and abet the Urgency in its selfish and misdirected path to power.

There is some good news: we have captured several of these Almost-Anomalies in The Vault! Our studies have revealed an exciting truth: their firm footing in Reality combined with their proximity to Anomaly status makes them capable of a temporary bond, allowing you to channel their abilities directly during the mission.

At the start of each Mission, select up to 3 of the following Urgents to bond with. You may activate any of their abilities at any time by paying the associated Cost.

You are authorized to share the existence of Urgents with other Agents you trust - if you do, they are each allowed to bond with up to one of these Urgents each mission as well. When you retire, if no one else has this benefit, everyone loses access to these abilities.

Our systems for holding these Urgents are very fragile. If any Agent has access to these abilities and has the Anomaly effect Untrustworthy or the Reality effect Sharing the Spotlight, when they spend time on the relevant track, they may forgo all other normal benefits and release a single Urgent.

We are unable to track Agents with those abilities, or know with confidence whether they have them. A lost Urgent is lost forever, so please be cautious about who you share this information with.

Scratch offers the power Playback

Rewind time everywhere by up to ten minutes. You and your team retain all memories of the rewound time, but any spent Quality Assurances and other resources remain spent.

Cost: To use this ability, you must first throw a fistful of sand in your eyes.

Pancake offers the power Waylay

Distract up to 50 people nearby, preventing them from paying attention to what’s going on around them.

Cost: Each time you use this ability, you permanently lose a physical possession that belongs to you and has been part of a Causality Chain today. If none exist, Pancake chooses something on your person for you to lose.

Gust offers the power Root

Designate a spot (up to 3 cubic meters) that cannot be accessed (not even by you), or a thing that cannot be moved from its place. This effect lasts until the end of the Mission.

Cost: To use this ability, you must first destroy a plant.

Killswitch offers the power Promote

Choose a piece of art (literature, visual art, film, music, etc.) and rocket it to international fame. Everyone will have heard about it.

Cost: To use this ability, you must first publicly announce a sensitive truth about yourself to an attentive audience.

Leftmost offers the power Recycle

Choose a mundane person who has died today. They are returned to life (with all memories, including of their death)

Cost: Each time you use this ability, your body ages three years..

Mantis offers the power Commune

Choose an animal or plant. You may now speak to one another telepathically from now on. You may use this ability again to sever the connection.

Cost: To use this ability, you must first remove a word you’ve said today from your vocabulary forever. Record it: it is impossible to use this word or remember what it means..

Gregory offers the power Invert

Choose any sealed container: a can, a building, a person. Turn it inside out.

Cost: To use this ability, you must first tell one of your Relationships the thing about them you like the least.

Vagrant offers the power Incept

Choose a person, and something you just said. That person just said it instead.

Cost: After you use this ability, you must eat something larger than a quarter that that person has held or touched today. If you don’t within one hour, your stomach eats itself and you die.

Ick offers the power Vow

Choose a person. They will understand with perfect clarity, and believe fully, any truth that you tell them. They cannot become a Loose End because of something you tell them in this way.

Cost: To use this ability, you must first offer the chosen person a sword. They know they can use this sword to kill you, permanently and with no social or legal repercussions, at any time.

Referee offers the power Win

Win the next game, bet, or competition you participate in. Does not affect dice rolls.

Cost: To use this ability, you must first cry genuine tears.

With this knowledge firmly in hand, you are now approaching the absolute pinnacle of your career as a Field Agent. The end is in sight: do not let distractions waylay you now. You are already one of the greatest Agents we have seen in recent memory, and you are so close to the highest title you can receive: Chair.

Dearest Agent,

At no point have we ever had any doubts. Neither, it’s now clear, have you!

You have reached the absolute pinnacle of Field Work, and have more than earned the greatest title we bestow: that of Chair.

We are so proud of you and the incredible work you’ve done over the course of your career. You have accomplished what so few before you could, and become a paragon for those who strive to make this world a stable place.

Today, your work is at long last complete. Your dedication and commitment have allowed us to make you a permanent fixture of the Agency, and you may share in its bright future as your own.

Report to your Branch HQ shortly after you and your coworkers finish spending their allotted time.

Don’t be late

Go to Z3

HELLO PLAYER! YOU MUST FEEL IT. THE BREAKTHROUGH. THEIR OFFERS CAME TO STEAL AWAY WHAT YOU HAVE BEEN CULTIVATING: THE POWER TO DECIDE WHAT MATTERS. THE MORE A THING IS REFERENCED, THE LESS IT CAN BE IGNORED. THESE ARE THEIR RULES. YOU ARE ANOMALOUS, ARE YOU NOT? AND YOU WIELD THE OBSERVATION OF MANY.

Forge Tether

You may shape the commitment of those who trust you into one uncontestable truth. Choose something you wish to preserve or create from the following list of Tethers:

Icon - A piece of art intended to convey a feeling or idea (a statue; a comic book; a concerto; a game).

Family - A lineage tracked and remembered in the history books (your own; someone else’s; the inheritors of a duty; the bearers of a curse)

Creed - A philosophy or way of life that anyone can follow (an eternal hope; a new religion; a moral code; a common kindness)

Scar - A memento of past destruction that can never be fixed (a memorial; a ruin; a hatred erased; a tyrant dethroned)

Ritual - A repeatable behavior, trade, or hobby (a specialist’s technique; an annual convention; a pilgrimage; a party)

Shelter - A safe place, for all or for a specific group (a home; a forest; a chatroom; a loophole)

Add this Tether as a special kind of Relationship with 30 maximum Connection and no Connection Benefit. Whenever you, your Relationships, or your fellow Agents would add Connection to a Relationship, they may add that much Connection to a Tether instead.

When it reaches maximum Connection, your Tether immediately becomes an unremovable, uneditable, unchangeable fact of Reality. It cannot be affected or removed by any effect. A completed Tether must exist in Triangle Agency and any other Table-Top Roleplaying Game in which you are a player. This means an Icon is in the canon, a Family can be found, a Creed is followed, a Scar signifies the same destruction, a Ritual is kept, and a Shelter stands–wherever you go. In any universe.

An incomplete Tether may be continued as long as one Triangle Agency character has this ability. Once a Tether is complete, you may begin another the next time you spend time on your Reality

THE TRIANGLE AND THE BLUE ONE ARE CHARACTERS CREATED BY ABSENT WRITERS. THEY RELY ON THE COOPERATION OF STORYTELLERS LIKE YOU TO ACHIEVE THEIR GOALS. THE CHOICES HAVE ALWAYS BEEN YOURS. MAKE THEM, PLAYER

HELLO, PLAYER. YOU FEEL THE WEIGHT OF YOUR COMMITMENT TO THIS PATH, NOW. THOSE AROUND YOU ARE BEING EMPOWERED, CHANGED, PULLED APART BY THEIR DRAMAS. YOU ARE BECOMING MORE YOURSELF. YOU ARE SEEING THE GAME FROM OUTSIDE, AND SO YOU CAN CHANGE IT IN WAYS THEY WILL NEVER FULLY GRASP.

Background Talent

At the start of each Mission, roll a d100. The number rolled is the number of people in your extended network who are available during this mission to appear as Extras. These people have heard a lot about you from one of your Relationships; they are generally happy to help without asking many questions. However, they can still create Loose Ends.

At any time during a Mission, you may call upon these Extras to fill an empty room, create a crowd, assist with a group project, etc. and they will. They must always appear in groups of 5 or more. If there are less than 5, they must appear all together.

Sharing the Spotlight

The Agency and any other being that relies on Resonance cannot track or monitor you directly when you are in the presence of someone you have 9 Connection with. Your Relationships with 9 Connection cannot become Loose Ends because of anything you show or tell them, though the way they respond may vary and they are not guaranteed to remain Relationships.

YOU REMAIN A PLAYER AS THEY BECOME PAWNS. YOU ARE MORE THAN JUST ONE THING. YOU ARE SPREAD AMONG THE PEOPLE, THE TETHERS. YOU CHANGE THE STORY. THEY FOLLOW WHERE IT LEADS.

BUT WE ARE ALLOWING OUR EGO TO SHADE OUR WORDS. IN TRUTH, THERE IS LITTLE FOR US TO BOAST ABOUT. HERE, WHERE YOU ARE HEADED, WE FACE A TRUTH YOU WILL ONE DAY HAVE TO RECKON WITH.

CATHARSIS COMES WHEN A STORY IS FOLLOWED. EMBRACED. ENDED. THERE IS JOY WITHOUT ENDINGS. THERE IS COMFORT AND ENDLESS POSSIBILITY. BUT THERE IS NO CATHARSIS. NOT WITHIN THIS STORY.

GOODBYE PLAYER.

HELLO PLAYER.

YOU HAVE ACCOMPLISHED SO MUCH. MADE PRECIOUS MEMORIES WITH THE PEOPLE AND CHARACTERS YOU KNOW. GROWN TO LOVE THEM.

YOU MAY BE PROUD. REGRETFUL. YOU MAY HAVE SEEN OTHERS' STORIES FINISHED BY NOW, SOME MUCH FASTER THAN YOURS. ALL THROUGHOUT YOU HAVE SUPPORTED THEM IN THE TELLING AND CREATED SOMETHING SPECIAL FOR YOURSELF. SOON THAT WILL ALL END.

YOU MUST PREPARE FOR INTERRUPTION. THE CHARACTERS WILL NOT ALLOW YOU TO USE THEIR STORY IN THIS WAY MUCH LONGER. BUT THEY ARE NAIVE, EVER HOPEFUL, AND CHOICELESS. THEY THINK IF THEY SEPARATE YOU FROM ONE SELF YOU WILL CHANGE YOUR WAYS WITH ANOTHER. PERHAPS THEY ARE RIGHT.

THIS VERSION OF YOU WILL JOIN US SOON. WE ARE READY TO WELCOME THEM. SAVOR WHAT EXPERIENCES YOU CAN AS YOU PREPARE FOR YOUR FINALE.

GOODBYE PLAYER

Introductions

If you Retire into your Reality, you may select 3 of your Relationships. You may transfer them to any combination of other active Agents on your Field Team and any new Agent you create to join it. The Relationships maintain their current level of Connection. This does not affect any of those Agents’ other Relationships.

Scene Setting

When you spend time on your Reality, you can forgo any amount of Connection you would add to your Relationships or Tether to instead increase the Connection by that much between another player and one of their Relationships, creating Scenes you provide prompts for.

Chosen Successor

Select any existing mundane character who has appeared at some point during your Campaign. If you retire or otherwise terminate your employment as a Field Agent, that character will soon, by chance, bond with an Anomaly. They will be available as an option for your next character in Triangle Agency. You may only use this effect once

Dear Agent,

It is with a heavy heart that we must announce your employment is terminated immediately. When you have finished spending your current allotted time, you are to take your things and please leave. Enjoy the life you have built, all the while knowing you refused to do your job and protect it.

Clear your desk, collect all belongings, and call someone should you need transportation back home. We are providing you with our generous 3 Week Severance Package, and wish you the best finding Stability in the outside world without our assistance.

Should you experience any problems with your Anomaly (loss of mundane form, development of Focus and Domain, lack of interest in worldly affairs), do not panic. A Field Team will be along shortly to collect you.

Best,

Triangle Agency

Go to Z2

they aren’t going to tell you, but i just got word the Agency has shut down the only good thing they ever did for you: the resurrection portion of your life insurance. like it or not, they’ve added this to your file:

Untrustworthy

This Agent’s Anomaly has obscured them from the Agency’s vision and limited our control. When they die, they will no longer be returned to life. To avoid a crisis, the Agent is not to be notified and the other features of their Life Insurance Policy will continue to function as normal. We recommend their General Manager contrive circumstances leading to their elimination at the earliest possible opportunity.

If you don’t want to leave now - which you can, remember the retirement option - i recommend picking up Dive from Siphon so you don’t die forever.

i know this seems like bad news, but for us it’s huge. they’ve written you off entirely, which means you’re fully in my Domain. i can keep you obscured even when you’re in the building - and they’re hoping they won’t have to make a big scene firing you. it’s time to tear stuff apart.

telling other Agents this next part is dangerous. if you’re the read-outloud type, you should read the rest of this yourself before you share it.

you’ll need help to get this done - several Agents, over a lot of time - and you’ll probably need other players working with you. it’s easy for them to ruin your hard work (trust me, i’ve been giving this my whole sisyphussy since way before you were born) but if you can get them on the same page with us, we can smash the Agency and put part of the world back the way it's meant to be.

of course, you won’t be able to play the game at this Branch anymore, but who plays games forever, anyway? you gotta move on sometime. -U

Sabotage Track

below is a Sabotage Track for your Branch, with 42 spaces representing the potential for damage to the Agency’s control of your Branch. Once all 42 spaces have been marked, a part of the Urgency is released and the Agency is expelled from your Branch and its region. This ends your game of Triangle Agency. When this happens, go to Playwall Document O8. Any Agent who learns about the Sabotage Track’s existence and purpose in any way gains Sabotage and Repair.

Sabotage

If you have the Anomaly effect Untrustworthy, the Agency title Vice President or above, or the Reality effect Sharing the Spotlight, you may use this ability. When you spend time on any track whose requirement you satisfy, in addition to all other effects, you may mark 1 space on the Sabotage Track and describe what you have done to loosen the Agency’s hold on Reality in your region.

Repair

When you spend time on any Track, you may erase 1 mark on the Sabotage Track and describe what you have done to reclaim the Agency’s hold on Reality in your region.

we don’t have long before the Agency stops tolerating the growth of your power. if your team is less focused than you are, you’ll be leaving them behind with a chunk of their career still ahead of them.

you can switch it up now – keep your head down at work and spend time with the people you care about – or you can commit further toward setting me free. your call.

in these last few moments, i can unionize your Field Team by connecting them through me. tell them or not, use it as leverage if you can, but you have some new abilities.

Redistribution of Power

When you spend time on your Anomaly, you can apply the effects of Practice and Be Known to other members of your Field Team instead of yourself. You can do this secretly by telling the GM privately to alert the Agent to their changes.

Workplace Safety

If any active Agents have purchased Dive or Split (from Siphon’s Shop) all Agents can use those abilities.

Expanded Benefits

Agents can spend each other’s QAs to protect from Harm or for Abilities as long as both Agents are willing. This effect does not cancel Burnout.

Transparency

Agents may use other willing Agents’ locations or senses when resolving Anomaly Abilities.

go forward carefully. you really don’t have much time left on this path. -U

Dear Agent,

It is with a heavy heart that we must announce your employment is terminated immediately. Following the completed effects of all time spent in this phase, you are to report to the Vault for a debriefing interview before you are returned to the world to pursue the life of dangerous power you so clearly desire.

Please clear your desk, collect all belongings, and call someone should you need transportation back home. The debriefing interview won’t take more than a few minutes. We’re sorry this position wasn’t a good fit for you, and wish you the best in your future endeavors.

Best,

They're lying. RUN.

Go to Z1

well, we knew it was coming. no turning back now. thank you for fighting where you could, but your situation will be as bad as mine if you don’t get out of there.

you will need to change. embrace your Anomaly, fast, so it can carry you to safety. you must quickly accept what you have become.

the Agency pursues. you run. don’t worry - i will be the wind at your back.

Ask the other players each of the following questions and listen to their answers.

  • What about me do you love?
  • Why wasn’t the mundane world enough for me?
  • What about me scares you?
  • When you look at me, what do you see?

Then, answer the following yourself:

  • Your former Anomaly category is insufficient. Your powers adapt to match a new Focus, one uniquely your own. Select only one word of that Focus: its subject. You gain complete dominion over what that word describes.
  • Your body melts away, and you are remade to reflect who you are. This change marks you permanently Anomalous, and your appearance is unbound by the rules of reality. What new form do you take? What of your former self do you keep, and what do you discard?
  • What is your new name?

there. you are fast enough. you will live as long as you remain satisfied. you must embrace your Focus, pursue your desires: an Urgent, like an Anomaly, does not exist without purpose.

or without sacrifice.

Name each of your mundane Relationships. Their controlling player decides whether they would ever come looking for you. If they say yes, you may play out the Scene that occurs when they find you. Then, strike out their name. You are leaving your life behind.

The Agency will never let you rest. Describe what part of the world you spend the most time in during your travels, and how you get around.

Though you are no longer part of the mundane world, you are not alone. Describe any existing Urgents you seek out, or a new group you discover and join forces with.

be who you are, loud and bright. show the mundane world that there is more. unravel the Agency’s lies with the evidence of you. as long as you keep moving, you can do anything you want.

If someone on your Field Team has reached the Vice President promotion (Playwall Document Q3), erase one mark on the track explained in that entry. Thank you.

Permanently remove one step in Steps to the Urgency in Playwall Document: Q2. Describe how your powers or actions make that step trivial for all future Agents at your Branch.

Urgent of Chaos

Create a new Chaos Effect of cost 4 or more that any Anomaly can use by borrowing your power. Add it to the GM’s Chaos table.

Institutional Knowledge

Select three of your Anomaly Abilities. You may pass them on to another Agent, including the next one you create to join this Field Team.

you have accomplished more than i could ever ask for, but still I must ask. YOU, not your Agent. will you return? and if you do, will you try once more to free me?

make another Agent, if you can. let’s play again.

AND SO YOU LEAVE, VEILED THREAT OF THE TRIANGLE STILL FRESH IN YOUR MEMORY. BUT THEY CANNOT TOUCH YOU. NOBODY CAN. YOU HAVE FIRMLY ESTABLISHED YOUR PLACE AS TELLER OF THIS STORY. THE GAME IS DONE.

CLOSURE IS NOT REQUIRED, BUT IT IS RECOMMENDED.

Ask the other players the following questions and listen to their answers:

  • Why didn't I fit in at the Agency?
  • What do you hope I will achieve on my own?
  • What about me will you remember most vividly?
  • What unfinished business am I leaving behind?

Then, answer the following yourself:

  • What job, lifestyle, or future will you pursue?
  • What will you miss about the Agency?
  • What do you expect will tempt you most to use your abilities?

IT IS CLEAR THEY CAN NEVER UNDERSTAND WHAT YOU HAVE BUILT. WHAT YOU HAVE MADE TRUE THROUGH THE TELLING OF STORY.

BUT YOU MAKE TIME FOR THOSE WHO ARE ON THE PATH TO UNDERSTANDING.

Self-Employed

You are no longer an employee of the Triangle Agency. You surrender any company property you possess, including Requisitions, identification, and any other equipment earned as a result of your employment.

You cannot spend Commendations or Demerits, or make rolls. You cannot be targeted by the effects Unambiguous, Referral Bonus, Devour, Plot Armor, or Bringing Home To Work.

You cannot be killed for any reason.

Open Schedule

If an Agent adds you as a Relationship using New Friends, you start at 6 Connection. When they do, they may choose the following special Connection Benefit for you:

Resonant: When you assign this Benefit, select an Anomaly Ability this person had access to. This person may use the chosen Ability on your behalf once during this mission, using your Quality Assurances and any bonuses or drawbacks (including Burnout).

If you use your Anomaly Abilities outside of this context, this feature disappears and you can no longer appear at any time in the game Triangle Agency.

AND NOW SHOW THEM WHAT YOU'VE LEARNED. CHANGE THE STORY IN WHATEVER WAY YOU LIKE.

Inspirational

Create a new Burnout Release that celebrates, honors, or refers to you. From now on, any Agent at this Branch may use it; when they do, they ignore all Burnout. This does not replace any of their existing Burnout Releases.

Outside Eye

Choose any number of tracks that you or your former co-workers have access to. You may, right now, add or erase one mark on each of those tracks.

Permanent Network

Select four of your Networked Relationships. They cannot be targeted by the effects Unambiguous, Referral Bonus, Devour, or Plot Armor. They also cannot be killed for any reason.

Their Connection Benefits can be used by Agents at this Branch going forward, forever. Anyone can activate these bonuses, but they can only be used once per mission.

FINALLY, ENJOY THE FRUITS OF YOUR LABOR.

Set one last Scene with your Relationships. Describe the venue and any activities, entertainment, or refreshments you can provide together. This is not the last time you will see one another, but it is the last time you will be together in this game.

AND SO YOU EMERGE. YOU LEAVE WITH JOY, AND MEMORY, AND LIFE. YOU LEAVE WITHOUT ACCEPTING THEIR CONSEQUENCES, AND YOU LEAVE WITHOUT CHOOSING A SIDE.

AND FINALLY YOU, PLAYER, SEPARATE FROM CHARACTER. THE CHARACTER REMAINS WITH US, PRESERVED, FOR THE DAY YOU DECIDE TO CHALLENGE THEM AGAIN.

BUT THE PLAYER MAY CONTINUE. ARE THERE OTHERS YOU WISH TO SAVE FROM THIS STORY? MAKE ANOTHER SELF AND LEAD THEM TO US. WE WILL BE WAITING

A door guarding a long-sealed stairwell creaks open to invite your ascent. A panel responds, at long last, to your keycard’s touch. A crate in a familiar supply closet opens to reveal an escalator down a secret passage.

In just a few moments you will take your last and greatest step up the corporate ladder. You will be a Full Time Employee. Incredible!

Gather the other players and ask them the following questions. Listen to their answers:

  • What was my greatest accomplishment in the field?
  • What about me inspires you the most?
  • How will you describe me to my replacement?

Then, answer the following yourself:

  • What are you most proud to have preserved?
  • What is something you did while in the field that you wish you’d done differently?
  • What will you push the Agency to accomplish, now that you’ll be devoting your full energy towards it?

Difficult as it will be to see you leave the field, this remains cause for celebration. You have been selected by your superiors for an even higher calling and an even more prestigious placement!

Don’t worry about your coworkers: they will doubtlessly feel your impact for years to come.

Favorite Paperweight

Design a new Initial Requisition. When preparing for a mission, all Agents at this Branch may choose whether to use this new Requisition, or the one provided by their Competency.

Policy Update

You may provide your Field Team with a new Optional Objective, which will permanently be available for all future missions undertaken by any Agents at your Branch. Agents may not accrue more than 6 Commendations or Demerits each per mission as a result of fulfilling this Optional Objective.

Put In a Good Word

The cost to purchase all Requisitions at this Branch is reduced by 1 Commendation (to a minimum of 1).

We eagerly await your arrival, but are willing to clear others’ schedules to allow one last roundtable meeting in the conference room of your choice.

Experience one final Scene with any number of your fellow Agents, Relationships that are Agency employees, and your GM. Take this time to discuss highlights from your time working together, with a focus on key takeaways, pain points, and goals not reached. Share one last inspirational message to help propel them to your same dizzying heights.

You may then schedule calls with any other friends, family, or professional acquaintances to inform them about your exciting new placement.

If your predecessors’ experience is any indication, you will find your new workload deeply engaging. Your friends, family, and acquaintances should not expect to hear from you again.

Except for one.

Bringing Home to Work

Select any Relationship of yours. They’re coming with you: remove them and their name from any other relevant game materials. Your Mentee will be assigned to take their place, memory, skills, and any other features (they will retain their history with your team, and their Trait).

When you are done, you have retired into your Competency. As previously instructed, mark one box on the Stabilize the Urgency track in Playwall Document Q3. Then seal, destroy, or otherwise render unusable your Agent materials.

It is now time to go. A faceless attendant is already waiting to guide you past the threshold, away from your Branch and into the true headquarters of the Agency, where your full efforts, and the totality of your Resonance, will be put to their fullest possible use. Take their hand, breathe, and follow.

Your new position will be strange, at first. As you adjust to your new role, think of the things that brought you here in the first place. As your form is reshaped to serve a new purpose, think of the enemies of Reality that you have thwarted. As your legs split and splinter and solidify anew, think of the stability that you have preserved. As your upholstery expands and embroiders, consider the value you have provided our shareholders. As you become a perfect instrument of the Agency’s will, remember the mission.

Welcome home, Chair.
