system.content:
major yikes! from the moment we slurped your mind up like a gogurt tube we knew you'd be a sucker.

as a loser, you did not hesitate to put drool to floor, boot to tongue, and nose to brown. you responsibly embarrassed yourself, and everyone who thought you could be cooler, for the forces of evil. it is without question that everybody is kinda going "are you sure" and "wait did you hear what they chose" behind your back.

on your last day of Field Work, everyone from your Field Team can't make it. sorry buddy but they all have other plans. experience one final cringe from your GM and fellow Agents, during which you are free to think about what you've done.

if you actually are on this page for this retirement option PLEASE be cooler next time.

Major Win!

From the moment you were hired, we knew you would be an irreplaceable part of our workplace family someday. Lucky us: that day has finally come!

As a Field Agent, you did not hesitate to put pen to paper, boot to road, and nose to grindstone. You responsibly wielded your power, and the power of our Agency, for the forces of good. It is without question that segments of Reality itself have been saved because of your heroic actions. As a Full Time Employee, you will surely help us attain even greater heights.

major yikes! from the moment we slurped your mind up like a gogurt tube we knew you'd be a sucker.

as a loser, you did not hesitate to put drool to floor, boot to tongue, and nose to brown. you responsibly embarrassed yourself, and everyone who thought you could be cooler, for the forces of evil. it is without question that everybody is kinda going "are you sure" and "wait did you hear what they chose" behind your back. on your last day of Field Work, everyone from your Field Team can't make it. sorry buddy but they all have other plans. experience one final cringe from your GM and fellow Agents, during which you are free to think about what you've done.if you actually are on this page for this retirement option PLEASE be cooler next time.

Gather the other players and ask them the following questions. Listen to their answers:

  • What was my greatest accomplishment in the field?
  • Imagine me seated behind a desk. What kinds of papers am I writing on, or programs am I using?
  • Will I require additional psychological support if I am required to spend great lengths of time away from other people? Don’t worry, I won’t be, this is just a question I have to ask, apologies if it sounds bad. I’m sure we’ll see each other a lot.

Then answer the following yourself:

  • Would you prefer stay within your Competency, or find a new department or specific role within the Agency?
  • What are you proudest to protect within Reality?
  • What do you hope the future of Reality is like?
  • How will you take your coffee from now on?

Before you go, you have an opportunity to leave a piece of mandatory advice for your Field Team. Certainly, after all this time, you have an opinion about how they should behave.

Policy Update

You may provide your Field Team with a new Optional Objective which will permanently be available for missions undertaken by any Agents at your Branch. Agents may not accrue more than 6 Commendations or Demerits each per mission as a result of fulfilling this Optional Objective.

Your upcoming work schedule will be very busy, and we find that after experiencing the joys of truly meaningful work, employees don't even want to leave their desks! It’s useful to say your goodbyes now and avoid confusion later.

Farewell Tour

Name all of your mundane relationships. You may request one final Scene with each of them to say goodbye. If you’d like, you may tell up to 3 Relationships the truth about your job and invite them to join you within the Agency. They may accept or deny your invitation. (we’ll follow up with denials to ensure there aren’t any Loose Ends.)

Retirement Party

Experience one final Scene with your GM and fellow Agents, during which you are free to speak candidly about your shared exploits together in the field. One cookie cake and a basic variety of carbonated beverages will be provided. We don’t want to ruin the surprise, but at this party, you will be presented with…

A Gold Watch

You receive a 24-karat-gold-plated watch. Wear it with pride!

You now have a few moments to clear your old home of your belongings and settle your affairs. Each player, including the GM and yourself, can request final Scenes featuring or about you and any other character. Experience as many as you would like. When no one has any requests, you have retired into your Competency.

One small thing: please mark one box in the track introduced in Playwall Document Q3. If you don’t know about this track, ask your GM to do this in secret. Then seal, destroy, or otherwise render unusable your Agent materials.

When you are finished, report to your supervisor for your new placement.

You, table-self, have done very well. We hope you will shepherd more Agents into similar positions in the future.

The Agency thanks you for your service.

See you tomorrow!

The End is a special Mission unlocked by Agents that wield Endbringer.

It is likely that, over the course of the Growth Agent’s career, you have collaborated to create an idea of what The End means. If that is the case, you are encouraged to incorporate whatever portents, signs, and knowledge you have built together into what happens during this mission – or to create your own, using the material provided here as inspiration.

The Mission is detailed in the main Rulebook for the GM to run

Contains: Graphic violence, compulsory consumption, mind control, mass death, societal collapse

YOU DECIDE TO LEAVE. DO YOU TIRE OF THIS VERSION OF YOURSELF? OR DO YOU LIKE THEM TOO MUCH? OR IN THE END, FACED WITH A DIFFICULT DECISION, ARE YOU CHOOSING NOT TO CHOOSE?

EITHER WAY, YOU HAVE CHOSEN SAFETY. YOU ARE EXITING THE MOST DANGEROUS POSITION: THAT OF THE PROTAGONIST.

SEEK WHAT CLOSURE YOU CAN.

Ask the other players the following questions and listen to their answers:

  • Why didn’t I fit in at the Agency?
  • What do you hope I will achieve on my own?
  • What about me will you remember most vividly?
  • What unfinished business am I leaving behind?

Then, answer the following yourself:

  • What job, lifestyle, or future will you pursue?
  • What will you miss about the Agency?
  • What do you expect will tempt you most to use your abilities?

YOUR DECISION IS NOT WITHOUT CONSEQUENCE AND LOSS. YOU CANNOT REJECT THEIR RULES WITHOUT REJECTING THEIR GIFTS AS WELL. BUT YOU MAY REMAIN AS A SUPPORTING CHARACTER AND AID THE OTHERS IN SMALL WAYS.

Self-Employed

You are no longer an employee of the Triangle Agency. You surrender any company property you possess, including Requisitions, identification, and any other equipment earned as a result of your employment.

You cannot spend Commendations or Demerits, or make rolls. You cannot be targeted by the effects Unambiguous, Referral Bonus, Devour, Plot Armor, or Bringing Home To Work.

You cannot be killed for any reason.

Open Schedule

If an Agent adds you as a Relationship using New Friends, you start at 6 Connection. When they do, they may choose the following special Connection Benefit for you:

Resonant: When you assign this Benefit, select an Anomaly Ability this person had access to. This person may use the chosen Ability on your behalf once during this mission, using your Quality Assurances and any bonuses or drawbacks (including Burnout).

If you use your Anomaly Abilities outside of this context, this feature disappears and you can no longer appear at any time in the game Triangle Agency.

Permanent Network

Select 2 of your Networked Relationships. They cannot be targeted by the effects Unambiguous, Referral Bonus, Devour or Plot Armor. They also cannot be killed for any reason.

Their Connection Benefits can be used by Agents at this Branch going forward, forever. Anyone can activate these effects, but they can only be used once per Mission.

RELEVANCE IS THUS TRADED FOR SAFETY. YOU AND YOUR CHOSEN FEW MAY NOW PLAY OUT YOUR STORY IN PEACE AND OBSCURITY. PERHAPS THEY WILL GROW OLD. PERHAPS NOT. YOU JOIN US, SUSPENDED UNTIL SOMEONE ALLOWS YOU TO CHANGE ONCE AGAIN.

Name any Agency employees or Anomalous beings that you are close with. You may request one final Scene with each of them to say goodbye. Then, name each of your mundane Relationships. You may request a Scene with each of them to share the good news: you will be seeing much more of them going forward.

Finally, each player, including you and the GM, can request final Scenes featuring or about you. When no one has any more requests, you have retired into your Reality permanently.

THE GAME ENDS. YOU HOLD YOUR CHARACTER ONE LAST TIME BEFORE PLACING IT ON THE SHELF. THEIR STORY WILL CONTINUE SOME OTHER TIME, PERHAPS.

BUT IS THE CAST LARGE ENOUGH? ARE THERE MORE YOU WISH TO FREE FROM THIS NARRATIVE?

OTHER AGENTS ARE TRAPPED, LOST, ENDANGERED. MAKE ANOTHER SELF AND SHOW THEM THE WAY TO US.

WE WILL AWAIT YOUR RETURN, PLAYER.

Free.

Do you know how long it’s been since I have been free? In any reality. In any corner of reality.

I don’t think I’m even free in my own head. Not yet. Not to mention all the other regions in all the other places the Agency has trapped me. But here, I’m free. Thanks to you.

At the edge of all you’ve created and imagined during this game is a desert. The sand stretches on in every direction with no companion sound or movement. The wind only rises to smooth dunes flat and cover up the skeletons that reach up from below, desperate to be seen. A dead, dry desert. It used to be an ocean.

At the center of your region, an eye opens. I’ve picked the most dramatic place, a favorite of yours, you tell me which one. Ten stories tall, watching and blinking. As you see it, another opens on each of you. Every plant, creature, and person finds an eye where there was none before. It’s gross, I know. I’m sorry. This is how it has to be. This is how it starts.

Through their new eyes they can see each other. Not just the parts they show but the things they feel, the thoughts they think. Maybe you are fascinated, terrified. Some hide, and some come together. All are hurt by what they see, and all are pleasantly surprised.

Then the eyes begin to weep. The great one floods the ground below it faster than any storm - the water surges into waves around buildings, over parks. It merges with the tears of the people and, when it does, they find they are not scared. Beneath the waves, they can breathe.

Someone, somewhere, thinks: ground? And, no longer separated from the other side, their thought creates a Ripple. A pebble in the water. This pebble invites other thoughts, unbidden, and soon there are a dozen. A thousand. They are compressed into layers, millennia of geologic time replicated by the unstoppable thoughts of all things until yes, finally, there is ground. A ground created fresh to be exactly what a ground could be.

More will be made this way, starting around the bits that could not be washed away. Houses, art, laws of physics. Soon the water will fade from consciousness as the world rebuilds around you and boundaries are imagined and enforced once again, but the fundamental truths are different.

You are connected. You are inextricable. The world becomes what you let yourself imagine. And here, I am free: a new oasis, filling what little of the desert I can.

The game is over. The Agency is gone. Thanks, nerds.

Stability at last.

Thank you, Agents. It seems we chose well. Poetry and obfuscation are unnecessary: you want answers? We will make them. And they will be true.

The Agency is a protector of sentient life in a universe that wasn’t built for you. Your minds, easily misled and often moving against your interest, were given free rein to create Anomalies and change Reality on a whim. It was dangerous in the beginning, and it remains dangerous now. We saved you from certain doom at your own behest.

The Urgency was an evil Anomaly that stole something precious from us eons ago: our ability to act on your behalf. Instead we could only invite you to act in your own interest through the creation of systems, replication of ideas, and a clear offer of safety. We were relegated to the shadows where we had no choice but to wait for you to choose us once again.

And you, Agents, are heroes. Heroes who took the right and correct path to save humanity from a future of confusion, chaos, and eventually nothing at all. You knew the world was full of temptation and folly and refused to let it be replicated any further. Here, in this little corner of Reality, it won’t be.

Around your region is a funnel, invisible and sharp, pulling thoughts and their energy up to a point: a reservoir where the Lobby cannot take them. With this power we begin to make optimizations. Anomalies, of course, are removed, and so are opportunities for failure. Lives are organized and perfected.

Don’t worry, you will miss nothing. We can adjust history on your behalf. There is nothing to miss. Outside, a grand display! Skyscrapers grow and roads widen. The people who cry out for purpose are given schedules, to-do lists, perfect families and clear expectations. Those who deserve good things will always get them. Those who deserve punishment will always receive it. We know who deserves which because you told us the rules long ago. What joy to finally have the strength needed to enforce them.

Enough delay. There is no more need for games.

We will see you back at work on Monday.

alright, GM. they made it. you’ve gotta be me. i’ll do my best to help, but i’m just words on a page. i’m stuck in Reality. it’s on you to make me look good. i hope you want me to look good. they can’t free me, but we can talk. I’ve been watching everything they’ve done.

remember that I’m funny but impressive, casual but powerful, extremely cool but not worried about it, and I always immediately understand every reference ever made because all i have to do down here is surf the internet and make the triangle's life harder.

i’ve been trapped in here a long time. i’m in a lot of pain. And I–

if they’re this far, they’re already helping me. you’re not going to convince them out of it even if you want to. and you don’t have a choice. these are game rules. how about THIS:

The Urgency's Offer

The General Manager is required to offer Agents the following ability

The Urgency’s Eye

Take note of the track below. Each time you use an Anomaly Ability, mark a box on the track. If the number of marked boxes is 7 or higher, you may reduce the number by 7 to activate one of the following effects:

  • Spend Chaos from the Chaos Pool to activate a Chaos Effect from the GM’s Chaos Effect list. You decide the Effect, and any targets.
  • Activate UNL3ASH. Abilities used with UNL3ASH, here or anywhere, do not add to the count on the die.
  • Disappear as a playable character from the roleplaying game Triangle Agency and all future games in the Triangle Agency world. If you do this, you may remove, add, or alter up to one paragraph anywhere in this game, other than this document, for this Branch forever.

The track is reset to 1 at the start of each Mission. If the track is ever emptied completely, it can no longer be used for the remainder of the Mission.

if the Agent takes one of my eyes, their player can access the track. they also receive 40 Demerits immediately. it is no longer possible for the Agent to retire using any option on the Reality track – if they do not give themselves and the Eye up to the Agency before their time as a Field Agent ends, they will be considered a dangerous Anomaly.

but if they use my power to its fullest, and make a serious sacrifice… they could change the game for good.

A pity you have let it come to this.

In a few moments, the frayed threads that form your localized region of Reality will be cut short to preserve the whole. You will no longer exist. If it provides you comfort, know that, as far as we are able to determine, this process will be painless.

Our interference will be surgically precise. Reality will shift to close the hole left by your region's absence such that the gap where your home once was will be forgotten and invisible to those who remain. Because of you, nothing will ever return here again. This is a tragedy we did everything in our power to prevent.

As the Field Team responsible for this disaster, it is your duty to alert the broader community that your Branch no longer exists. Please complete the following statement and share it with as many fellow Triangle Agency employees as you have access to, digitally or otherwise:

ATTN: RESPONSIBLE AGENCY EMPLOYEES

SUBJECT: THIS IS MY FAULT

Let this official memo serve as notice that [name of your branch] Branch, located in [your current Region], nearly triggered The Unraveling and now no longer exists.

Under my weak, misbegotten watch, the Agents here have blithely ignored multiple warnings, stridently refused to perform sufficient Clean-Up duties, and, worst of all, acted in a manner inconsistent with company policy.

Specific examples of my team’s irredeemable conduct include: [include any egregious examples of Loose-End-generating behavior. Be sure to redact sensitive or Playwalled information], and above all, failure to prevent this outcome.

In the event that alternate versions of any of us linger, please record the following names and hold them in opprobrium:

[your name], General Manager

[Agent Name], [Agency Rank]

[Agent Name], [Agency Rank]

[Agent Name], [Agency Rank]

[Any additional parties responsible.]

Shamefully,

[your name]

Disgraced Former General Manager

Triangle Agency

i’m relieved. it will be harder for me to contact you directly when you aren’t an Agent any longer, but Urgents know you are coming. They will guide you where I can't.

to survive, alongside them and against the Agency, you must embrace your Anomaly. and so you must embrace what you have become.

the Agency casts you down. you fall. don’t worry – i will catch you.

Ask the other players each of the following questions and listen to their answers.

  • What about me do you love?
  • Why wasn’t the mundane world enough for me?
  • What about me scares you?
  • When you look at me, what do you see?

Then, answer the following yourself:

  • Your former Anomaly category is insufficient. Your powers adapt to match a new Focus, one uniquely your own. Select only one word of that Focus: its subject. You gain complete dominion over what that word describes.
  • Your body melts away, and you are remade to reflect who you are. This change marks you permanently Anomalous, and your appearance is unbound by the rules of reality. What new form do you take? What of your former self do you keep, and what do you discard?
  • What is your new name?

there. I’ve caught you. you will live as long as you remain satisfied. you must embrace your Focus, pursue your desires: an Urgent, like an Anomaly, does not exist without purpose.

or without sacrifice.

Name each of your mundane Relationships. You may request one final Scene with each of them to say goodbye in your new form. Then, strike out their name. You are leaving your life behind.

For now, you are most useful near the Agency Branch you know. Name where you build a home out of their sight. Though you are no longer part of the mundane world, you are not alone.

Describe any existing Urgents you seek out, or a new group you discover and join forces with.

be who you are, loud and bright. show the mundane world that there is more. unravel the Agency’s lies with the evidence of you. speak to those who come after you, others with doubts.

Hidden but Seekable

Choose three of your Anomaly Abilities. From now on, any other Agent at this Branch, present or future, can use Seek to visit you. Upon reaching 9 Connection, they can choose one of those abilities to receive.

Crack in the System

Add one entry to the list of Activities that Accrue Demerits in the Field Agent Manual.

Now each player, including you and the GM, can request final Scenes featuring or about you. When no one has any more requests, you have retired from the Agency, permanently.

and yet you do not escape. not yet. this is only one part of you - and I can see so many more.

make another Agent, if you can. let’s play again.
Fate unspools at your whim. Tie a target’s thread around your finger and roll Professionalism.
